notes: v362 — FIXED 'NOT AUTO RUNNING' AT STARTUP. You reported the app sitting on the 'First run: downloading all ASX data' banner with nothing happening. Two real causes found and fixed. (1) A startup race: your saved API key is restored into the key box a moment AFTER the auto-load fires — so the load quietly bailed thinking there was no key, and the 'waiting for the list' check gave up silently after just 20 seconds (less than one slow fetch). Now every loader falls back to your saved key directly, the list load retries itself for up to 30 minutes, and if it still can't get the list it TELLS you (connection warning) instead of going quiet. (2) If you ever pressed Cancel on the 'Download ALL data?' pop-up, an internal 'download running' flag stayed stuck ON — silently blocking every later download (automatic, scheduled and manual) until you reloaded the page. That's reset properly now. Hard-refresh (Ctrl+F5) to load v362. ALSO RECENT — v361: faster scanning, filtering, sorting & scrolling. (Older notes live in the Owner's Manual changelog.)
